en.ahmedali: These are the verses of the sagacious Book,
en.ahmedraza: These are verses of the wise Book.
en.arberry: Those are the signs of the Wise Book
en.daryabadi: These are verses of the Wise Book.
en.hilali: These are Verses of the Wise Book (the Quran).
en.itani: These are the Verses of the Wise Book.
en.maududi: These are the verses of the Wise Book,
en.mubarakpuri: These are Ayat of the Wise Book.
en.pickthall: These are revelations of the wise Scripture,
en.qarai: These are the signs of the wise Book,
en.qaribullah: Those are the verses of the Wise Book,
en.sahih: These are verses of the wise Book,
en.sarwar: These are the verses of the Book of wisdom.
en.shakir: These are verses of the Book of Wisdom
en.wahiduddin: These are the verses of the Book of wisdom,
en.yusufali: These are Verses of the Wise Book,-
fa.ansarian: این آیات [با عظمتِ] کتاب محکم و استوار است،
fa.bahrampour: اينها آيات كتاب حكمت آموز است
fa.ghomshei: این (قرآن عظیم و) آیات کتاب حکیم است.
fa.khorramdel: این، آیات کتاب پرمحتوا و استوار (قرآن) است. [[«تِلْکَ آیَاتُ ...»: (نگا: یونس / 1).]]
fa.makarem: این آیات کتاب حکیم است (کتابی پرمحتوا و استوار)!
fa.mojtabavi: اين است آيتهاى كتاب با حكمت
fa.sadeqi: آنها آیات کتاب لبریز از حکمت است.
